scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] P-Asserted-Identity: "Invite" <sip:Invite@avaya.com> Supported: 100rel, histinfo, join, replaces, sdp-anat, timer Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 18 a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes
CANCEL sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] CANCEL Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 813324 BYE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
